title: Shopify Q3 2025 Financial Results
content: OTTAWA, ON — Shopify Inc., the leading provider of essential internet infrastructure for commerce, today announced financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2025. Revenue for the third quarter of 2025 was $2.16 billion, representing 26% growth compared with the comparable quarter in 2024. Gross Merchant Volume (GMV) for the quarter was $69.7 billion, up 24% compared with Q3 2024. Gross Profit for the quarter was $1.08 billion, up 24% year-over-year, representing a gross margin of 50.1%. Operating loss on a GAAP basis was $63 million; adjusted operating income was $339 million, representing a 15.7% adjusted operating margin. Free cash flow was $341 million, representing a 16% free cash flow margin. Harley Finkelstein, President of Shopify, said: 'We are building the definitive commerce operating system. Our unified platform — connecting Shopify Payments, Shopify Capital, Shopify Balance, and our B2B and POS solutions — means merchants can run every aspect of their business through Shopify.' Shopify Payments penetration reached 62% of eligible GMV in Q3. Shopify Balance active accounts grew 40% year-over-year. Monthly recurring revenue (MRR) grew 25% to $175 million. The company reaffirmed full-year 2025 revenue growth guidance of mid-to-high twenties percent.
